🔍 Fraud Detection - Full Pipeline¶

Bagian 1: Import Library¶

In [1]:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import seaborn as sns
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")

from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler, RobustScaler
from sklearn.decomposition import PCA
from sklearn.metrics import (
    accuracy_score, roc_auc_score, classification_report,
    confusion_matrix, ConfusionMatrixDisplay,
    PrecisionRecallDisplay, average_precision_score
)
from imblearn.combine import SMOTEENN
from imblearn.over_sampling import SMOTE
from imblearn.under_sampling import EditedNearestNeighbours

print("Import selesai")

Import selesai

numeric_data = data.select_dtypes(include=[np.number])

nan_columns = numeric_data.columns[numeric_data.isna().any()].tolist()
if nan_columns:
    print("Columns with NaN values:", nan_columns)

In [9]:
transaction_counts = data["type"].value_counts().sort_values(ascending=False).reset_index()
transaction_counts.columns = ["Transaction Type", "Count"]

plt.figure(figsize=(8, 6))
ax = sns.barplot(x="Transaction Type", y="Count", data=transaction_counts, palette="viridis")
for i, value in enumerate(transaction_counts["Count"]):
    ax.text(i, value + 2000, f"{value:,}", ha="center", va="bottom", fontsize=10, fontweight="bold")
plt.title("Distribution of Transaction Types", fontsize=14, fontweight="bold")
plt.xlabel("Transaction Type", fontsize=12)
plt.ylabel("Number of Transactions", fontsize=12)
ax.set_yticks([])
sns.despine(left=True)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [10]:
fraud_by_type = (
    data.groupby("type")["isFraud"]
    .mean()
    .sort_values(ascending=False)
    .reset_index()
)
fraud_by_type.columns = ["Transaction Type", "Fraud Rate"]

plt.figure(figsize=(8, 6))
ax = sns.barplot(x="Transaction Type", y="Fraud Rate", data=fraud_by_type, palette="coolwarm")
for i, value in enumerate(fraud_by_type["Fraud Rate"]):
    ax.text(i, value + 0.0001, f"{value*100:.2f}%", ha="center", va="bottom",
            fontsize=12, fontweight="bold", color="black")
plt.title("Fraud Rate by Transaction Type", fontsize=16, fontweight="bold")
plt.xlabel("Transaction Type", fontsize=12)
plt.ylabel("Fraud Rate (%)", fontsize=12)
ax.set_yticks([])
sns.despine(left=True)
ax.grid(False)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [11]:
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
sns.kdeplot(np.log1p(data[data["isFraud"] == 0]["amount"]),
            label="Non-Fraudulent", fill=True, color="blue", bw_adjust=0.5)
sns.kdeplot(np.log1p(data[data["isFraud"] == 1]["amount"]),
            label="Fraudulent", fill=True, color="red", bw_adjust=0.5)
plt.title("Distribution of Transaction Amounts (Fraudulent vs Non-Fraudulent)",
          fontsize=16, fontweight="bold")
plt.xlabel("Log(1 + Transaction Amount)", fontsize=12)
plt.ylabel("Density", fontsize=12)
plt.legend(title="Transaction Type", fontsize=11)
sns.despine()
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [12]:
from matplotlib.ticker import FuncFormatter

def millions(x, pos):
    return f"${int(x*1e-6)}M"

plt.figure(figsize=(12, 7))
sns.set_style("whitegrid")
palette = "coolwarm"
y_min, y_max = 0, 5000000

for idx, (col, title) in enumerate([
    ("oldbalanceOrg",  "Old Balance (Origin Account)"),
    ("newbalanceOrig", "New Balance (Origin Account)"),
    ("oldbalanceDest", "Old Balance (Destination Account)"),
    ("newbalanceDest", "New Balance (Destination Account)"),
]):
    plt.subplot(2, 2, idx+1)
    sns.boxplot(x="isFraud", y=col, data=data, palette=palette, showfliers=False)
    plt.title(title, fontsize=14, fontweight="bold")
    plt.xlabel("" if idx < 2 else "Transaction Type", fontsize=12)
    plt.ylabel("", fontsize=12)
    plt.xticks([0,1], ["Not Fraud", "Fraud"])
    plt.gca().yaxis.set_major_formatter(FuncFormatter(millions))
    plt.ylim(y_min, y_max)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [13]:
df_tmp = data.copy()
df_tmp["day"] = data["step"] // 24
fraud_per_day = df_tmp[df_tmp["isFraud"] == 1].groupby("day").size()

plt.figure(figsize=(12, 6))
sns.set_style("whitegrid")
plt.plot(fraud_per_day.index, fraud_per_day.values,
         color="gray", linewidth=2, marker="o", markersize=6)
plt.title("Number of Fraudulent Transactions Per Day", fontsize=16, fontweight="bold")
plt.xlabel("Month Day", fontsize=12)
plt.ylabel("Number of Fraudulent Transactions", fontsize=12)
plt.xticks(fraud_per_day.index[::5])
plt.yticks(visible=False)
plt.tight_layout()
for spine in plt.gca().spines.values():
    spine.set_visible(False)
plt.show()

fraud_counts  = data["isFraud"].value_counts()
fraud_percent = data["isFraud"].value_counts(normalize=True) * 100

plt.figure(figsize=(8, 6))
ax = sns.barplot(x=fraud_counts.index, y=fraud_counts.values, palette=["skyblue", "salmon"])
for i, (count, percent) in enumerate(zip(fraud_counts.values, fraud_percent.values)):
    plt.text(i, count + max(fraud_counts.values)*0.01, f"{percent:.2f}%",
             ha="center", va="bottom", fontsize=12, fontweight="bold")
ax.set_xticklabels(["Not Fraud", "Fraud"])
ax.set_ylabel("Number of Transactions", fontsize=12)
ax.set_xlabel("")
plt.title("Distribution of Target Classes Transactions", fontsize=16, fontweight="bold")
sns.despine(left=True)
ax.set_yticks([])
ax.grid(False)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

Bagian 4: Feature Engineering¶

In [16]:
data["balanceDiffOrig"] = data["oldbalanceOrg"] - data["newbalanceOrig"]
data["balanceDiffDest"] = data["oldbalanceDest"] - data["newbalanceDest"]
print("balanceDiffOrig & balanceDiffDest dibuat")

balanceDiffOrig & balanceDiffDest dibuat
In [17]:
# CATATAN: senderTxnCount & receiverTxnCount DIPINDAH ke setelah train-test split
# untuk menghindari data leakage (count dihitung dari full data termasuk test set)
# Fitur ini akan dibuat di Cell "Feature Engineering Post-Split" di bawah
print("senderTxnCount & receiverTxnCount akan dibuat setelah split — lihat Bagian 6")

senderTxnCount & receiverTxnCount akan dibuat setelah split — lihat Bagian 6
In [18]:
data["destIsMerchant"] = data["nameDest"].str.startswith("M").astype(int)
print("destIsMerchant dibuat")

destIsMerchant dibuat
In [19]:
data = pd.get_dummies(data, columns=["type"])
print("One-hot encoding selesai")

One-hot encoding selesai
In [20]:
# Drop kolom yang tidak diperlukan (kecuali nameOrig & nameDest — akan dipakai post-split untuk count mapping)
data.drop(columns=[
    "oldbalanceOrg", "newbalanceOrig",
    "oldbalanceDest", "newbalanceDest",
    "isFlaggedFraud"
], inplace=True)

print(f"Shape setelah drop kolom: {data.shape}")
print("Kolom nameOrig & nameDest dipertahankan untuk count mapping post-split")

Shape setelah drop kolom: (6362620, 13)
Kolom nameOrig & nameDest dipertahankan untuk count mapping post-split
In [21]:
# Cek duplikat sebelum dihapus
duplicate_rows = data.duplicated().sum()
print(f"Jumlah baris duplikat ditemukan: {duplicate_rows}")

# Hapus duplikat
data = data.drop_duplicates().reset_index(drop=True)

# Verifikasi
print(f"Jumlah duplikat setelah dihapus : {data.duplicated().sum()}")
print(f"Shape setelah hapus duplikat    : {data.shape}")
data["isFraud"].value_counts()

Bagian 5: Stratified Sampling (20%)¶

In [22]:
data_shuffled = data.sample(frac=1, random_state=42).reset_index(drop=True)

data_sample = (
    data_shuffled.groupby("isFraud", group_keys=False)
                 .apply(lambda x: x.sample(frac=0.20, random_state=42))
                 .reset_index(drop=True)
)

print("Distribusi kelas setelah sampling:")
print(data_sample["isFraud"].value_counts())
print(f"Shape sample: {data_sample.shape}")

Distribusi kelas setelah sampling:
isFraud
0    1270881
1       1643
Name: count, dtype: int64
Shape sample: (1272524, 13)

Bagian 6: Train-Test Split, Scaling & SMOTEENN¶

SEMUA PERBAIKAN LEAKAGE:

  • Bug 1 — Data Leakage Scaler: Scaler sekarang di-fit hanya pada x_train, lalu di-transform ke x_test.
  • Bug 2 — Double Split Redundan: Hanya satu split bersih dengan stratify.
  • Bug 3 — SMOTE bocor ke test set: SMOTEENN hanya di-apply ke x_train.
  • Bug 4 — senderTxnCount / receiverTxnCount Leakage: Count transaksi dihitung dari full data (termasuk test). Sekarang dipindah ke post-split: dihitung dari x_train saja, lalu di-map ke x_test.
In [23]:
x_sample = data_sample.drop(columns=["isFraud"])
y_sample  = data_sample["isFraud"]

# SPLIT DULU sebelum apapun
x_train, x_test, y_train, y_test = train_test_split(
    x_sample, y_sample,
    test_size=0.2,
    random_state=42,
    stratify=y_sample
)

print(f"Train size : {x_train.shape[0]:,} | Fraud: {y_train.sum():,} ({y_train.mean()*100:.2f}%)")
print(f"Test  size : {x_test.shape[0]:,} | Fraud: {y_test.sum():,} ({y_test.mean()*100:.2f}%)")

Train size : 1,018,019 | Fraud: 1,314 (0.13%)
Test  size : 254,505 | Fraud: 329 (0.13%)
In [24]:
# Feature Engineering Post-Split: senderTxnCount & receiverTxnCount
# Dihitung HANYA dari x_train, lalu di-map ke x_test
# Ini mencegah test set "bocor" ke train melalui agregasi count

x_train = x_train.copy()
x_test  = x_test.copy()

# Hitung count dari train saja
sender_count_map   = x_train.groupby("nameOrig")["nameOrig"].transform("count")
receiver_count_map = x_train.groupby("nameDest")["nameDest"].transform("count")

x_train["senderTxnCount"]   = sender_count_map.values
x_train["receiverTxnCount"] = receiver_count_map.values

# Buat mapping mean count per nameOrig/nameDest dari train
sender_map   = x_train[["nameOrig", "senderTxnCount"]].drop_duplicates().set_index("nameOrig")["senderTxnCount"]
receiver_map = x_train[["nameDest", "receiverTxnCount"]].drop_duplicates().set_index("nameDest")["receiverTxnCount"]

# Map ke test — entitas yang tidak ada di train diisi median train
x_test["senderTxnCount"]   = x_test["nameOrig"].map(sender_map).fillna(sender_map.median())
x_test["receiverTxnCount"] = x_test["nameDest"].map(receiver_map).fillna(receiver_map.median())

# Drop kolom name (tidak dipakai model)
x_train.drop(columns=["nameOrig", "nameDest"], inplace=True)
x_test.drop(columns=["nameOrig", "nameDest"], inplace=True)

print(f"Post-split features train: {x_train.shape[1]} kolom")
print(f"Post-split features test : {x_test.shape[1]} kolom")
print("Fitur:", x_train.columns.tolist())

Post-split features train: 12 kolom
Post-split features test : 12 kolom
Fitur: ['step', 'amount', 'balanceDiffOrig', 'balanceDiffDest', 'destIsMerchant', 'type_CASH_IN', 'type_CASH_OUT', 'type_DEBIT', 'type_PAYMENT', 'type_TRANSFER', 'senderTxnCount', 'receiverTxnCount']
In [25]:
# Fit scaler HANYA pada x_train, transform ke x_test
numerical_features = ["amount", "balanceDiffOrig", "balanceDiffDest",
                      "senderTxnCount", "receiverTxnCount"]

robust_scaler   = RobustScaler()
standard_scaler = StandardScaler()

x_train[numerical_features] = robust_scaler.fit_transform(x_train[numerical_features])
x_test[numerical_features]  = robust_scaler.transform(x_test[numerical_features])

x_train[["step"]] = standard_scaler.fit_transform(x_train[["step"]])
x_test[["step"]]  = standard_scaler.transform(x_test[["step"]])

print("Scaling selesai (fit hanya pada train)")
print("Fitur numerik yang di-scale:", numerical_features + ["step"])

Scaling selesai (fit hanya pada train)
Fitur numerik yang di-scale: ['amount', 'balanceDiffOrig', 'balanceDiffDest', 'senderTxnCount', 'receiverTxnCount', 'step']
In [26]:
# SMOTEENN hanya pada x_train — x_test tidak disentuh
smoteenn = SMOTEENN(
    sampling_strategy=0.2,
    random_state=42,
    smote=SMOTE(k_neighbors=5, random_state=42),
    enn=EditedNearestNeighbours(n_neighbors=3)
)

x_train_bal, y_train_bal = smoteenn.fit_resample(x_train, y_train)

print(f"Setelah SMOTEENN:")
print(f"  Train balanced: {dict(zip(*np.unique(y_train_bal, return_counts=True)))}")
print(f"  Test (original, tidak diubah): {dict(zip(*np.unique(y_test, return_counts=True)))}")
print(f"  Fitur: {x_train_bal.shape[1]} kolom")

Setelah SMOTEENN:
  Train balanced: {np.int64(0): np.int64(1016705), np.int64(1): np.int64(1016023)}
  Test (original, tidak diubah): {np.int64(0): np.int64(254176), np.int64(1): np.int64(329)}
  Fitur: 12 kolom

Bagian 7: Visualisasi PCA¶

In [27]:
def plot_pca_side_by_side(datasets, labels, n_components=2):
    fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, len(datasets), figsize=(8*len(datasets), 6))
    for i, (X, y) in enumerate(datasets):
        # Pastikan hanya kolom numerik yang masuk PCA
        if hasattr(X, "select_dtypes"):
            X = X.select_dtypes(include=[np.number])
        scaler_pca = StandardScaler()
        X_scaled   = scaler_pca.fit_transform(X)
        pca        = PCA(n_components=n_components, random_state=42)
        X_pca      = pca.fit_transform(X_scaled)
        scatter = axes[i].scatter(
            X_pca[:, 0], X_pca[:, 1],
            c=y, cmap="coolwarm", alpha=0.5, s=5
        )
        axes[i].set_title(labels[i], fontsize=14, fontweight="bold")
        axes[i].set_xlabel(f"PC1 ({pca.explained_variance_ratio_[0]*100:.1f}%)")
        axes[i].set_ylabel(f"PC2 ({pca.explained_variance_ratio_[1]*100:.1f}%)")
        handles, _ = scatter.legend_elements()
        axes[i].legend(handles, ["Non-Fraud", "Fraud"])
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.show()

# x_full: ambil kolom numerik saja dari data_sample (nameOrig/nameDest masih ada di sini)
numeric_cols_for_pca = data_sample.select_dtypes(include=[np.number]).columns.drop("isFraud")
x_full = data_sample[numeric_cols_for_pca]
y_full = data_sample["isFraud"]

# x_train sudah bersih (nameOrig/nameDest sudah di-drop di cell sebelumnya)
# x_train_bal juga sudah bersih
datasets = [
    (x_full,          y_full.values),
    (x_train,         y_train.values),
    (x_train_bal,     y_train_bal.values)
]
labels = ["Sample (Original — numerik saja)", "Train Set (Pre-SMOTE)", "Train Set (Post-SMOTEENN)"]
plot_pca_side_by_side(datasets, labels)
In [28]:
print("Fitur yang digunakan untuk modeling:", x_train_bal.columns.tolist())

Fitur yang digunakan untuk modeling: ['step', 'amount', 'balanceDiffOrig', 'balanceDiffDest', 'destIsMerchant', 'type_CASH_IN', 'type_CASH_OUT', 'type_DEBIT', 'type_PAYMENT', 'type_TRANSFER', 'senderTxnCount', 'receiverTxnCount']

Bagian 8: Install Dependencies Modeling¶

In [29]:

!pip install catboost optuna pytorch-tabular tabpfn -q

Pastikan semua dependencies sudah terinstall sebelum lanjut ke modeling

Bagian 9: Helper — Fungsi Evaluasi Model¶

In [30]:
def evaluate_model(model_name, y_true, y_pred, y_prob):
    """Evaluasi komprehensif: Classification Report, AUC-ROC, PR-AUC, CM, PR Curve"""
    sep = "=" * 60
    print(f"\n{sep}")
    print(f"  {model_name}")
    print(f"{sep}")
    print(classification_report(y_true, y_pred, target_names=["Non-Fraud", "Fraud"]))
    print(f"  AUC-ROC  : {roc_auc_score(y_true, y_prob):.4f}")
    print(f"  PR-AUC   : {average_precision_score(y_true, y_prob):.4f}")

    fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(12, 4))
    ConfusionMatrixDisplay(
        confusion_matrix(y_true, y_pred),
        display_labels=["Non-Fraud", "Fraud"]
    ).plot(ax=axes[0], cmap="Blues", colorbar=False)
    axes[0].set_title(f"{model_name} - Confusion Matrix")
    PrecisionRecallDisplay.from_predictions(y_true, y_prob, ax=axes[1])
    axes[1].set_title(f"{model_name} - Precision-Recall Curve")
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.show()

print("Fungsi evaluate_model siap")

Fungsi evaluate_model siap

Bagian 10: Model 1 — CatBoost + Optuna¶

In [31]:
# Install pytorch-tabular
!pip install pytorch-tabular -q

import importlib, pytorch_tabular
importlib.reload(pytorch_tabular)
print("pytorch-tabular versi:", pytorch_tabular.__version__)

pytorch-tabular versi: 1.1.0
In [32]:
import optuna
import torch
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
from catboost import CatBoostClassifier

optuna.logging.set_verbosity(optuna.logging.WARNING)

# ── Deteksi GPU ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
use_gpu  = torch.cuda.is_available()
task_type = "GPU" if use_gpu else "CPU"
print(f"CatBoost task_type : {task_type}")
print(f"GPU name           : {torch.cuda.get_device_name(0) if use_gpu else 'Tidak ada'}")

# ── Cast boolean columns ke int ───────────────────────────────────────────────
def cast_to_numeric(df):
    bool_cols = df.select_dtypes(include='bool').columns
    if len(bool_cols) > 0:
        print(f"  Cast bool→int: {bool_cols.tolist()}")
        df = df.copy()
        df[bool_cols] = df[bool_cols].astype(int)
    return df

x_train_bal = cast_to_numeric(x_train_bal)
x_test      = cast_to_numeric(x_test)

# ── Konversi ke numpy float32 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
x_train_cb = np.array(x_train_bal, dtype=np.float32)
x_test_cb  = np.array(x_test,      dtype=np.float32)
y_train_cb = np.array(y_train_bal, dtype=np.int32)
y_test_cb  = np.array(y_test,      dtype=np.int32)

assert not np.isnan(x_train_cb).any(), "x_train_cb mengandung NaN!"
assert not np.isinf(x_train_cb).any(), "x_train_cb mengandung Inf!"
assert not np.isnan(x_test_cb).any(),  "x_test_cb mengandung NaN!"
print(f"Data OK — train: {x_train_cb.shape}, test: {x_test_cb.shape}")

scale_pos_weight = (y_train_cb == 0).sum() / (y_train_cb == 1).sum()
print(f"scale_pos_weight   : {scale_pos_weight:.2f}")

# ── Optuna Tuning ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def catboost_objective(trial):
    params = {
        "iterations":          trial.suggest_int("iterations",          200, 600),
        "learning_rate":       trial.suggest_float("learning_rate",     5e-3, 0.2, log=True),
        "depth":               trial.suggest_int("depth",               4, 8),
        "l2_leaf_reg":         trial.suggest_float("l2_leaf_reg",       1.0, 10.0, log=True),
        "bagging_temperature": trial.suggest_float("bagging_temperature", 0.0, 1.0),
        "random_strength":     trial.suggest_float("random_strength",   1e-2, 5.0, log=True),
        "border_count":        trial.suggest_int("border_count",        32, 128),
        "loss_function":       "Logloss",
        "eval_metric": "Logloss" if use_gpu else "AUC",
        "random_seed":         42,
        "verbose":             False,
        "allow_writing_files": False,
        "scale_pos_weight":    scale_pos_weight,
        "task_type":           task_type,
        "devices":             "0",        # eksplisit GPU index
    }
    # border_count > 32 tidak didukung di GPU CatBoost — override jika GPU
    if use_gpu:
        params["border_count"] = min(params["border_count"], 32)

    try:
        model = CatBoostClassifier(**params)
        model.fit(
            x_train_cb, y_train_cb,
            eval_set=(x_test_cb, y_test_cb),
            early_stopping_rounds=30,
            verbose=False
        )
        y_prob = model.predict_proba(x_test_cb)[:, 1]
        return roc_auc_score(y_test_cb, y_prob)
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  [Trial skip] {type(e).__name__}: {str(e)[:100]}")
        raise optuna.TrialPruned()

print("\nTuning CatBoost dengan Optuna (30 trials)...")
study_cb = optuna.create_study(
    direction="maximize",
    sampler=optuna.samplers.TPESampler(seed=42)
)
study_cb.optimize(catboost_objective, n_trials=30, show_progress_bar=True)

completed = [t for t in study_cb.trials if t.state.name == "COMPLETE"]
print(f"\nTrials selesai : {len(completed)} / 30")
print(f"Best AUC-ROC   : {study_cb.best_value:.4f}")
print(f"Best params    : {study_cb.best_params}")

CatBoost task_type : GPU
GPU name           : Tesla T4

  Cast bool→int: ['type_CASH_IN', 'type_CASH_OUT', 'type_DEBIT', 'type_PAYMENT', 'type_TRANSFER']

Best params    : {'iterations': 464, 'learning_rate': 0.01254809887325121, 'depth': 4, 'l2_leaf_reg': 4.181098545523036, 'bagging_temperature': 0.432073332716816, 'random_strength': 0.1998717937619909, 'border_count': 106}
In [33]:
# ── Train Final CatBoost ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
best_cb_params = study_cb.best_params.copy()
best_cb_params.update({
    "loss_function":       "Logloss",
    "eval_metric": "Logloss" if use_gpu else "AUC",
    "random_seed":         42,
    "verbose":             False,
    "allow_writing_files": False,
    "scale_pos_weight":    scale_pos_weight,
    "task_type":           task_type,
    "devices":             "0",
})
if use_gpu:
    best_cb_params["border_count"] = min(best_cb_params.get("border_count", 32), 32)

catboost_model = CatBoostClassifier(**best_cb_params)
catboost_model.fit(
    x_train_cb, y_train_cb,
    eval_set=(x_test_cb, y_test_cb),
    early_stopping_rounds=30,
    verbose=100
)

y_pred_cb = catboost_model.predict(x_test_cb)
y_prob_cb = catboost_model.predict_proba(x_test_cb)[:, 1]
evaluate_model("CatBoost", y_test_cb, y_pred_cb, y_prob_cb)

Bagian 11: Model 2 — FT-Transformer + Optuna¶

In [34]:
import optuna
import inspect
import torch
from pytorch_tabular import TabularModel
from pytorch_tabular.models import FTTransformerConfig
from pytorch_tabular.config import DataConfig, TrainerConfig, OptimizerConfig

optuna.logging.set_verbosity(optuna.logging.WARNING)

# ── Deteksi GPU otomatis ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
device     = "cuda" if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu"
accelerator = "gpu" if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu"
print(f"Device   : {device.upper()}")
print(f"GPU name : {torch.cuda.get_device_name(0) if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'Tidak ada'}")
print(f"VRAM     : {torch.cuda.get_device_properties(0).total_memory / 1e9:.1f} GB" if torch.cuda.is_available() else "VRAM     : -")

# ── Helper kompatibel lintas versi ───────────────────────────────────────────
def make_trainer_config(max_epochs, patience):
    base = dict(
        max_epochs=max_epochs,
        batch_size=1024 if torch.cuda.is_available() else 512,  # batch lebih besar di GPU
        early_stopping="valid_loss",
        early_stopping_patience=patience,
        accelerator=accelerator,
        devices=1,
        load_best=True,
        progress_bar="none",   # matikan progress bar per epoch agar log bersih
    )
    valid = inspect.signature(TrainerConfig.__init__).parameters.keys()
    return TrainerConfig(**{k: v for k, v in base.items() if k in valid})

def make_optimizer_config(lr):
    valid = inspect.signature(OptimizerConfig.__init__).parameters.keys()
    if "lr" in valid:
        return OptimizerConfig(lr=lr)
    elif "learning_rate" in valid:
        return OptimizerConfig(learning_rate=lr)
    else:
        return OptimizerConfig()

print("\nTrainerConfig args  :", [k for k in inspect.signature(TrainerConfig.__init__).parameters.keys()])
print("OptimizerConfig args:", [k for k in inspect.signature(OptimizerConfig.__init__).parameters.keys()])

# ── Persiapan data ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
feature_cols = x_train_bal.columns.tolist()

train_df = pd.concat([
    x_train_bal.reset_index(drop=True),
    y_train_bal.reset_index(drop=True)
], axis=1)
test_df = pd.concat([
    x_test.reset_index(drop=True),
    y_test.reset_index(drop=True)
], axis=1)
train_df["isFraud"] = train_df["isFraud"].astype(int)
test_df["isFraud"]  = test_df["isFraud"].astype(int)

data_config = DataConfig(
    target=["isFraud"],
    continuous_cols=feature_cols,
    categorical_cols=[],
    num_workers=2 if torch.cuda.is_available() else 0,  # parallel loading di GPU
)

# ── Optuna Tuning ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def ftt_objective(trial):
    model_config = FTTransformerConfig(
        task="classification",
        num_heads       = trial.suggest_categorical("num_heads",       [2, 4, 8]),
        num_attn_blocks = trial.suggest_int("num_attn_blocks",         2, 6),
        attn_dropout    = trial.suggest_float("attn_dropout",          0.0, 0.3),
        ff_dropout      = trial.suggest_float("ff_dropout",            0.0, 0.3),
        input_embed_dim = trial.suggest_categorical("input_embed_dim", [32, 64, 128]),
    )
    lr = trial.suggest_float("lr", 1e-4, 1e-2, log=True)

    try:
        m = TabularModel(
            data_config=data_config,
            model_config=model_config,
            optimizer_config=make_optimizer_config(lr),
            trainer_config=make_trainer_config(max_epochs=15, patience=3),
            verbose=False,
        )
        m.fit(train=train_df, validation=test_df)
        result = m.evaluate(test_df)
        for key in ["test_auroc", "test_AUROC", "auroc", "AUROC"]:
            if key in result[0]:
                return result[0][key]
        # Fallback hitung manual
        pred     = m.predict(test_df)
        prob_col = [c for c in pred.columns if "prob" in c.lower() and "1" in c]
        return roc_auc_score(test_df["isFraud"].values, pred[prob_col[0]].values) if prob_col else 0.5
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  [Trial skip] {type(e).__name__}: {str(e)[:100]}")
        raise optuna.TrialPruned()

print("\nTuning FT-Transformer dengan Optuna (15 trials)...")
study_ftt = optuna.create_study(
    direction="maximize",
    sampler=optuna.samplers.TPESampler(seed=42)
)
study_ftt.optimize(ftt_objective, n_trials=15, show_progress_bar=True)

completed = [t for t in study_ftt.trials if t.state.name == "COMPLETE"]
print(f"\nTrials selesai : {len(completed)} / 15")
print(f"Best AUC-ROC   : {study_ftt.best_value:.4f}")
print(f"Best params    : {study_ftt.best_params}")

Device   : CUDA
GPU name : Tesla T4
VRAM     : 15.6 GB

TrainerConfig args  : ['self', 'batch_size', 'data_aware_init_batch_size', 'fast_dev_run', 'max_epochs', 'min_epochs', 'max_time', 'accelerator', 'devices', 'devices_list', 'accumulate_grad_batches', 'auto_lr_find', 'auto_select_gpus', 'check_val_every_n_epoch', 'gradient_clip_val', 'overfit_batches', 'deterministic', 'profiler', 'early_stopping', 'early_stopping_min_delta', 'early_stopping_mode', 'early_stopping_patience', 'early_stopping_kwargs', 'checkpoints', 'checkpoints_path', 'checkpoints_every_n_epochs', 'checkpoints_name', 'checkpoints_mode', 'checkpoints_save_top_k', 'checkpoints_kwargs', 'load_best', 'track_grad_norm', 'progress_bar', 'precision', 'seed', 'trainer_kwargs']
OptimizerConfig args: ['self', 'optimizer', 'optimizer_params', 'lr_scheduler', 'lr_scheduler_params', 'lr_scheduler_monitor_metric', 'lr_scheduler_interval']

Trials selesai : 15 / 15
Best AUC-ROC   : 0.9926
Best params    : {'num_heads': 2, 'num_attn_blocks': 5, 'attn_dropout': 0.002264195794887902, 'ff_dropout': 0.28652166878333996, 'input_embed_dim': 64, 'lr': 0.0024015639024822476}
In [35]:
# ── Train Final FT-Transformer ────────────────────────────────────────────────
bp = study_ftt.best_params

ftt_model = TabularModel(
    data_config=data_config,
    model_config=FTTransformerConfig(
        task="classification",
        num_heads=bp["num_heads"],
        num_attn_blocks=bp["num_attn_blocks"],
        attn_dropout=bp["attn_dropout"],
        ff_dropout=bp["ff_dropout"],
        input_embed_dim=bp["input_embed_dim"],
    ),
    optimizer_config=make_optimizer_config(bp["lr"]),
    trainer_config=make_trainer_config(max_epochs=30, patience=5),
)
ftt_model.fit(train=train_df, validation=test_df)

pred_df  = ftt_model.predict(test_df)
prob_col = [c for c in pred_df.columns if "prob" in c.lower() and "1" in c]
if not prob_col:
    prob_col = [c for c in pred_df.columns if "prob" in c.lower()]
print("Kolom probabilitas:", prob_col)

y_prob_ftt = pred_df[prob_col[0]].values
y_pred_ftt = (y_prob_ftt >= 0.5).astype(int)
evaluate_model("FT-Transformer", y_test.values, y_pred_ftt, y_prob_ftt)

Bagian 12: Model 3 — TabPFN¶

Catatan: TabPFN dirancang untuk dataset kecil (<= 10.000 sampel, <= 100 fitur). Model ini menggunakan in-context learning sehingga tidak butuh hyperparameter tuning sama sekali.

In [36]:

In [37]:
from tabpfn_client import TabPFNClassifier, set_access_token
import numpy as np

access_token = "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJ1c2VyIjoiZTg3ODkwODAtMDM4YS00YmQ2LWEzZmYtZDZhNjdiYjdkOTg1IiwiZXhwIjoxODA4MDY2NDQ5fQ.PGsIRCvikl8zV2WskPqK3vUeUQMA_bAXYDPK4gYIkiw"
set_access_token(access_token)
print("Access token TabPFN dikonfigurasi.")

# TabPFN client: maks 10.000 train + maks 10.000 test per call
MAX_TRAIN = 10000
MAX_TEST  = 10000

# Subsample train
if len(x_train_bal) > MAX_TRAIN:
    print(f"Subsample train: {len(x_train_bal):,} → {MAX_TRAIN:,}")
    rng = np.random.RandomState(42)
    idx = rng.choice(len(x_train_bal), MAX_TRAIN, replace=False)
    x_train_pfn = x_train_bal.iloc[idx].values
    y_train_pfn = y_train_bal.iloc[idx].values
else:
    x_train_pfn = x_train_bal.values
    y_train_pfn = y_train_bal.values

# Subsample test
if len(x_test) > MAX_TEST:
    print(f"Subsample test : {len(x_test):,} → {MAX_TEST:,}")
    rng2 = np.random.RandomState(42)
    idx2 = rng2.choice(len(x_test), MAX_TEST, replace=False)
    x_test_pfn  = x_test.iloc[idx2].values
    y_test_pfn  = y_test.iloc[idx2].values
else:
    x_test_pfn = x_test.values
    y_test_pfn = y_test.values

print(f"Train shape: {x_train_pfn.shape}")
print(f"Test  shape: {x_test_pfn.shape}")

print("Training TabPFN (via cloud)...")
tabpfn = TabPFNClassifier()
tabpfn.fit(x_train_pfn, y_train_pfn)

y_prob_pfn = tabpfn.predict_proba(x_test_pfn)[:, 1]
y_pred_pfn = (y_prob_pfn >= 0.5).astype(int)
evaluate_model("TabPFN", y_test_pfn, y_pred_pfn, y_prob_pfn)

Access token TabPFN dikonfigurasi.
Subsample train: 2,032,728 → 10,000

Bagian 13: Perbandingan Akhir Ketiga Model¶

In [39]:
# ── Overlay Precision-Recall Curves ──────────────────────────────────────────
from sklearn.metrics import PrecisionRecallDisplay, average_precision_score

# Gunakan y_test konsisten: y_test_cb untuk CB, y_test.values untuk FTT, y_test_pfn untuk TabPFN
auprc_cb  = average_precision_score(y_test_cb,     y_prob_cb)
auprc_ftt = average_precision_score(y_test.values, y_prob_ftt)
auprc_pfn = average_precision_score(y_test_pfn,    y_prob_pfn)

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(9, 7))

PrecisionRecallDisplay.from_predictions(
    y_test_cb,     y_prob_cb,
    name=f'CatBoost (AUPRC={auprc_cb:.3f})',
    ax=ax, color='steelblue'
)
PrecisionRecallDisplay.from_predictions(
    y_test.values, y_prob_ftt,
    name=f'FT-Transformer (AUPRC={auprc_ftt:.3f})',
    ax=ax, color='darkorange'
)
PrecisionRecallDisplay.from_predictions(
    y_test_pfn,    y_prob_pfn,
    name=f'TabPFN (AUPRC={auprc_pfn:.3f})',
    ax=ax, color='seagreen'
)

ax.set_title('Precision-Recall Curves — Model Comparison', fontsize=15, pad=15, fontweight='bold')
ax.set_xlabel('Recall', fontsize=12)
ax.set_ylabel('Precision', fontsize=12)
ax.legend(loc='lower left', fontsize=11)
ax.grid(True, linestyle='--', alpha=0.5)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [41]:
# ── Side-by-side Confusion Matrices ──────────────────────────────────────────
from sklearn.metrics import confusion_matrix, ConfusionMatrixDisplay

cm_cb  = confusion_matrix(y_test_cb,     y_pred_cb)
cm_ftt = confusion_matrix(y_test.values, y_pred_ftt)
cm_pfn = confusion_matrix(y_test_pfn,    y_pred_pfn)

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 3, figsize=(18, 5))
configs = [
    ('CatBoost (Optuna)',       cm_cb,  'Blues'),
    ('FT-Transformer (Optuna)', cm_ftt, 'Oranges'),
    ('TabPFN (Zero-Shot)',       cm_pfn, 'Greens'),
]
for ax, (title, cm, cmap) in zip(axes, configs):
    ConfusionMatrixDisplay(
        confusion_matrix=cm,
        display_labels=['Non-Fraud', 'Fraud']
    ).plot(cmap=cmap, colorbar=False, ax=ax)
    ax.set_title(title, fontsize=13, fontweight='bold', pad=12)
    ax.set_xlabel('Predicted Label', fontsize=11)
    ax.set_ylabel('True Label', fontsize=11)
    ax.grid(False)

plt.suptitle('Confusion Matrices — All Models', fontsize=15, fontweight='bold', y=1.02)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [42]:
# ── Summary Performance Table ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
from sklearn.metrics import f1_score, precision_score, recall_score

results = []
for name, y_true, y_pred, y_proba in [
    ('CatBoost (Optuna)',       y_test_cb,     y_pred_cb,  y_prob_cb),
    ('FT-Transformer (Optuna)', y_test.values, y_pred_ftt, y_prob_ftt),
    ('TabPFN (Zero-Shot)',      y_test_pfn,    y_pred_pfn, y_prob_pfn),
]:
    results.append({
        'Model'    : name,
        'AUC-ROC'  : round(roc_auc_score(y_true, y_proba), 4),
        'PR-AUC'   : round(average_precision_score(y_true, y_proba), 4),
        'F1-Score' : round(f1_score(y_true, y_pred), 4),
        'Precision': round(precision_score(y_true, y_pred), 4),
        'Recall'   : round(recall_score(y_true, y_pred), 4),
    })

results_df = pd.DataFrame(results).set_index('Model')
results_df = results_df.sort_values('AUC-ROC', ascending=False)

print('=' * 70)
print('              MODEL PERFORMANCE COMPARISON SUMMARY')
print('=' * 70)
print(results_df.to_string())
print('=' * 70)

Model

In [43]:
# ── Save Models ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
import joblib

joblib.dump(catboost_model, 'catboost_optuna.pkl')
joblib.dump(tabpfn,         'tabpfn_model.pkl')
joblib.dump(robust_scaler,  'robust_scaler.pkl')
joblib.dump(standard_scaler,'standard_scaler.pkl')
ftt_model.save_model('ft_transformer_optuna')

print('Models saved successfully:')
print('catboost_optuna.pkl')
print('ft_transformer_optuna/')
print('tabpfn_model.pkl')
print('robust_scaler.pkl')
print('standard_scaler.pkl')

`weights_only` was not set, defaulting to `False`.
